title: GoalSpec
description: Payload for message_type=GoalSpec. Sent by Concierge → Commissioner. Represents a complete, unambiguous set of requirements. Commissioner MUST NACK if interactions.length < 4 or any acceptance_test is vague.

goal_summary.description: A clear, unambiguous statement of what should be built. Must be specific enough to write a failing test from.

3d.description: 3D libraries if applicable (e.g. r3f, three, drei).

state.description: State management approach (e.g. zustand, react, redux).

other.description: Any additional tooling not covered above.

offline_after_install.description: If true, the app must work fully offline after npm install.

no_external_apis.description: If true, no runtime calls to external APIs are permitted.

target_devices.description: Target device profiles (e.g. typical_laptop, mobile, desktop).

interactions.description: Distinct user interactions. Commissioner MUST NACK if fewer than 4.

id.description: Stable identifier for this interaction (e.g. exhibit_A).

user_action.description: What the user does (e.g. click, tap, drag).

visible_change.description: Observable change in the UI after the action. Must be specific enough to verify.

state_change.description: Internal state that changes (e.g. 'subdivisionDepth increments by 1').

numeric_readout.description: What number or formula is displayed to the user after the interaction.

acceptance_tests.description: Pass/fail acceptance criteria. Commissioner MUST NACK vague tests (e.g. 'looks nice', 'works well').

maintenance_scope.description: Whether this is a throwaway demo or production-quality maintainable code.

defaults_applied.description: List of assumptions Concierge applied without explicit user confirmation.

open_questions.description: Must be empty ([]) before GoalSpec is sent. If non-empty, Concierge must resolve them first.
